allow:
Bash(/tmp/write_yaml2.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
Set-Content -Path 'C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-api-gateway\\src\\main\\resources\\application.yml' -Encoding UTF8 -Value @'
spring:
  application:
    name: api-gateway
  config:
    import: optional:file:.env[.properties]
  profiles:
    active: ${ENVIRONMENT:dev}
  main:
    web-application-type: reactive
'@
Write-Host 'FILE 2 written: malvinas-api-gateway/application.yml'
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/write_yaml3.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
Set-Content -Path 'C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-api-gateway\\src\\main\\resources\\application-dev.yml' -Encoding UTF8 -Value @'
spring:
  config:
    activate:
      on-profile: dev
  cloud:
    gateway:
      routes:
        - id: auth-service
          uri: lb://auth-service
          predicates:
            - Path=/api/auth/**

        - id: personal-service
          uri: lb://personal-service
          predicates:
            - Path=/api/employees/**, /api/roles/**, /api/attendances/**
          filters:
            - JwtAuthFilter

        - id: vehiculos-service
          uri: lb://vehiculos-service
          predicates:
            - Path=/api/vehicles/**, /api/vehicle-types/**
          filters:
            - JwtAuthFilter

        - id: cargas-service
          uri: lb://cargas-service
          predicates:
            - Path=/api/loads/**
          filters:
            - JwtAuthFilter

        - id: rutas-service
          uri: lb://rutas-service
          predicates:
            - Path=/api/dispatches/**, /api/delivery-points/**
          filters:
            - JwtAuthFilter

        - id: reportes-service
          uri: lb://reportes-service
          predicates:
            - Path=/api/reports/**, /api/kpis/**
          filters:
            - JwtAuthFilter

server:
  port: 8080

eureka:
  client:
    service-url:
      defaultZone: http://localhost:8761/eureka
    register-with-eureka: true
    fetch-registry: true
  instance:
    prefer-ip-address: true
    lease-renewal-interval-in-seconds: 30

jwt:
  secret: malvinas-dev-secret-key-change-in-production

management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: always

logging:
  level:
    com.malvinas: DEBUG
    org.springframework.cloud.gateway: WARN
'@
Write-Host 'FILE 3 written: malvinas-api-gateway/application-dev.yml'
PSEOF)

Set-Content -Path 'C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-personal-service\\src\\main\\resources\\application-dev.yml' -Encoding UTF8 -Value @'
spring:
  config:
    activate:
      on-profile: dev
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:postgresql://${LOCAL_DB_HOST:localhost}:5432/${LOCAL_DB_NAME:malvinas_db}
    username: ${LOCAL_DB_USERNAME:postgres}
    password: ${LOCAL_DB_PASSWORD:postgres}
    driver-class-name: org.postgresql.Driver
    hikari:
      maximum-pool-size: 5
      connection-timeout: 20000
  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: update
    show-sql: true
    properties:
      hibernate:
        dialect: org.hibernate.dialect.PostgreSQLDialect
        default_schema: staff
        format_sql: true
  data:
    jpa:
      repositories:
        bootstrap-mode: deferred

Set-Content -Path 'C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-vehiculos-service\\src\\main\\resources\\application-prod.yml' -Encoding UTF8 -Value @'

  config:
    activate:
      on-profile: prod
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:postgresql://${POSTGRESQL_HOST}:5432/${POSTGRESQL_DB}
    username: ${POSTGRESQL_USER}
    password: ${POSTGRESQL_PASS}
    driver-class-name: org.postgresql.Driver
    hikari:
      maximum-pool-size: 10
      minimum-idle: 2
      connection-timeout: 30000
      idle-timeout: 600000
      max-lifetime: 1800000

  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: update
    show-sql: false

        dialect: org.hibernate.dialect.PostgreSQLDialect
        default_schema: vehicles
  data:
    jpa:
      repositories:
        bootstrap-mode: deferred

Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Path 'C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA' -Filter 'application*.yml' |

  ForEach-Object { Write-Host \("{0,8} bytes  {1}" -f $_.Length, $_.FullName\) }

Bash(/tmp/write_envs.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false

$personal = @"
ENVIRONMENT=dev
SERVER_PORT=8081
LOCAL_DB_HOST=localhost
LOCAL_DB_NAME=malvinas_db
LOCAL_DB_USERNAME=postgres
LOCAL_DB_PASSWORD=postgres
JWT_SECRET=malvinas-dev-secret-key-change-in-production
EUREKA_URI=http://localhost:8761/eureka
"@

$vehiculos = @"
ENVIRONMENT=dev
SERVER_PORT=8082
LOCAL_DB_HOST=localhost
LOCAL_DB_NAME=malvinas_db
LOCAL_DB_USERNAME=postgres
LOCAL_DB_PASSWORD=postgres
EUREKA_URI=http://localhost:8761/eureka
"@

$cargas = @"
ENVIRONMENT=dev
SERVER_PORT=8083
LOCAL_DB_HOST=localhost
LOCAL_DB_NAME=malvinas_db
LOCAL_DB_USERNAME=postgres
LOCAL_DB_PASSWORD=postgres
EUREKA_URI=http://localhost:8761/eureka
"@

$rutas = @"
ENVIRONMENT=dev
SERVER_PORT=8084
LOCAL_DB_HOST=localhost
LOCAL_DB_NAME=malvinas_db
LOCAL_DB_USERNAME=postgres
LOCAL_DB_PASSWORD=postgres
EUREKA_URI=http://localhost:8761/eureka
"@

[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\('C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-personal-service\\.env',  $personal,  $utf8NoBom\)
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\('C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-vehiculos-service\\.env', $vehiculos, $utf8NoBom\)
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\('C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-cargas-service\\.env',    $cargas,    $utf8NoBom\)
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\('C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-rutas-service\\.env',     $rutas,     $utf8NoBom\)

Write-Host "Done. Verifying files..."
Get-Item 'C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-personal-service\\.env',
         'C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-vehiculos-service\\.env',
         'C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-cargas-service\\.env',
         'C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\malvinas-rutas-service\\.env' |
  Select-Object FullName, Length
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/verify_envs.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$services = @\(
    'malvinas-personal-service',
    'malvinas-vehiculos-service',
    'malvinas-cargas-service',
    'malvinas-rutas-service'
\)

foreach \($svc in $services\) {
    $path = "C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\$svc\\.env"
    Write-Host "=== $svc ==="
    Get-Content $path
    Write-Host ""
}

Write-Host "--- BOM check \(first 3 bytes of each file\) ---"
foreach \($svc in $services\) {
    $path = "C:\\projects\\malvinas_SOA\\$svc\\.env"
    $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\)
    $bom = $bytes[0..2] -join ','
    Write-Host "${svc}: first bytes = $bom  \(239,187,191 = BOM; anything else = no BOM\)"
}
PSEOF)
